title: coleataenia rigidula subsp. condensa
intro: Coleataenia rigidula subsp. condensa, also known as the constricted panic grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The constricted panic grass is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular natural remedy. Herbal preparations of Coleataenia rigidula subsp. condensa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
